sub_modules.dct1d_8_sign_extend: Combinational adapter that explicitly interprets the unsigned top-level sample port as a signed fixed-point value.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_matrix_core: Combinational 8x8 fixed-point transform matrix. Uses Q2.14 orthonormal DCT coefficients and selects either the DCT matrix or its transpose for IDCT mode.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_output_mux: Combinational serializer mux that selects one of the eight stored transform results according to the output index.
